title: WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides career training, employment opportunities, and job finding assistance for individuals to further professional, educational, and personal development. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the African American community and additional communities of color Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday noon-5pm Email (503) 280-2600 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 280-2600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * African American Community Job Finding Assistance Job Finding Assistance * African American Community Prejob Guidance Prejob Guidance * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY AND CIVIC ENGAGEMENT COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALTH HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN COMMUNITY PARTNER LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUTH PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND
